zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne於1035年7月7日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，他的父親Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne23歲，母親Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais17歲。他和Sibylle de Barcelone至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1074年1月27日在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特維特-奧-洛格斯享年38歲，埋葬在法國瑟。

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dorothy
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

nameMeanings.name: 'Donzel'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Cornish surname Denzell, a local name from a place in Cornwall. It came to be used as a given name in the Hollis family in the 16th century, when the Hollis family and the Denzell family became connected by marriage, and spread from there into more general use. It is borne by the African American actor Denzel Washington ( b. 1954 ).

variants.name: Denzil
meanings: From the Cornish surname Denzell, a local name from a place in Cornwall. It came to be used as a given name in the Hollis family in the 16th century, when the Hollis family and the Denzell family became connected by marriage, and spread from there into more general use. It is borne by the African American actor Denzel Washington ( b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne was born on 7 July 1035, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne, was 23 and his mother, Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais, was 17. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Sibylle de Barcelone. He died on 27 January 1074, in Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 38, and was buried in Seine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne est né le 7 juillet 1035, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Sibylle de Barcelone. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1074, à Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Seine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne am 7. Juli 1035 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne 23 und seine Mutter Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais 17. Er hatte mit Sibylle de Barcelone mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Januar 1074 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Seine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne è nato il il 7 luglio 1035 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Sibylle de Barcelone. Morì il 27 gennaio 1074, nel Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Seine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogneが1035年7月7日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Robert Ier duc de Bourgogneは23歳，母Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnaisは17歳であった。彼はSibylle de Barceloneとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1074年1月27日にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトヴィトリ-アウクス-ロジェズで38歳で死去し，フランスセアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne(이)가 1035년 7월 7일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Sibylle de Barcelone(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1074년 1월 27일 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 비트리-오스-로그스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne nasceu em 7 de julho de 1035, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Sibylle de Barcelone. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1074, em Vitry-aux-Loges, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Seine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri dit 'Donzel' duc de Bourgogne родился 7 июля 1035 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais, 17. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Sibylle de Barcelone. Он умер 27 января 1074 г. в местности витри-аукс-логесь, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности син, Франция.
